title: 2nd Iranian Ship Heads Towards Sri Lanka, Officials Say 'Could Be Targeted'
summary_full: Iran-Israel-US war: The vessel was carrying more than 100 crew, reports said, adding they too could be targeted the same way a sister ship was sunk yesterday.
summary_public: Iran-Israel-US war: The vessel was carrying more than 100 crew, reports said, adding they too could be targeted the same way a sister ship was sunk yesterday.

IR.evidence: Iranian Ship Heads Towards Sri Lanka
